from source import hanoi

def test_hanoi_two_disks_correct_moves():
    # Test hanoi(2, start=1, end=3) returns exactly [(1,2),(1,3),(2,3)]
    # The bug causes the first move to be (1,3) instead of (1,2) and the second move to be (1,2) instead of (1,3)
    # due to incorrectly appending (start, helper) instead of (start, end) in the base case handling
    expected = [(1, 2), (1, 3), (2, 3)]
    result = hanoi(2, start=1, end=3)
    assert result == expected, f"Expected {expected}, got {result}"
